title: Searching Your Photos
drDigitalIntro: Modern photo apps can recognize what's in your photos — people's faces, places, animals, food, and more. You can search for 'beach' and see all your beach photos. Or 'dog' to see every photo with a dog. Or type someone's name. This saves enormous time when you have thousands of photos. The search happens right on your device; your photos aren't sent anywhere.

steps.say: Click the Search bar at the top.

drDigitalSuccess: You searched your photos! The photo app recognizes what's in your images so you can find them fast.
drDigitalHint: Click the Search bar and type a word like 'beach' to find matching photos.
